title: hsp90-smfret-model: Three-state kinetic model for single-molecule FRET data
description: A minimal Python pipeline to process single-molecule FRET (.tracks/.h5) data and fit a three-state kinetic model (Open ↔ Intermediate ↔ Closed) with state-dependent photobleaching. Includes global multi-start optimisation, bootstrap confidence intervals, and Sobol sensitivity analysis.
notes: Built with Python ≥ 3.11. Dataset (Hugel 2025, Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17559063) must be downloaded separately before running the pipeline.
